summary: Tested VAT rate feature (vat_rate field) on both backend and frontend. All 4 backend pytest cases passed and all UI flows (upload conditional row, edit dialog prefill/toggle, catalog preview rendering) work as specified.
critical_code_review_comments: ProductManage edit dialog: when '+ iva' is toggled ON while editing, vat_rate stays at previous value (correct). When toggled OFF, vat_rate is cleared to null on the fly (line 316) — good, matches requirement.
CatalogCreate.jsx (1621 lines) exceeds 700-line guideline; consider splitting into subcomponents (ProductCard, sidebar tabs).
Dialog components missing aria-describedby (console warnings) — accessibility improvement only.
seed_data_creation: Created & cleaned up TEST_VAT_* products via API during automated tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Feature verified: (1) POST/PUT/GET /api/products supports vat_rate float/null; (2) ProductUpload.jsx conditionally renders [data-testid=vat-rate-row] when checkbox-vat-plus is checked; (3) ProductManage edit dialog prefills edit-product-vat-rate from saved value, toggling edit-vat-plus off hides edit-vat-rate-row and clears vat_rate to null on save; (4) CatalogCreate preview and PublicCatalog render '+ iva ({rate}%)' with parentheses when rate is set, and '+ iva' alone when not set; global settings.vatRate fallback works when product has no per-product label.
